hero.heading: Gapflow and Azure AI
hero.subheading: Enterprise AI services with Azure Cognitive Services and Machine Learning

documentation.title: Getting Started with Azure AI
documentation.description: Connect Azure AI services to Gapflow and leverage enterprise-grade cognitive capabilities.

documentation.title: Cognitive Services Integration
documentation.description: Use Vision, Speech, Language, and Decision services for intelligent applications.

documentation.title: Azure Machine Learning
documentation.description: Train, deploy, and manage ML models at scale with Azure ML integration.

tutorials.title: Intelligent Document Processing
tutorials.description: Build an automated document processing pipeline that extracts and validates data from any form.

tutorials.title: Multi-Language Customer Support
tutorials.description: Create a support system with automatic translation and speech recognition for global customers.

tutorials.title: Visual Quality Inspection
tutorials.description: Set up automated quality inspection using Custom Vision for manufacturing processes.

faqs.question: How do I connect Azure AI?
faqs.answer: Use Azure subscription keys and endpoints for each service. Managed identity recommended for production.

faqs.question: What services are available?
faqs.answer: Vision, Speech, Language, Decision, Azure OpenAI, Form Recognizer, Video Indexer, and more.

faqs.question: Can I use Azure OpenAI?
faqs.answer: Yes! Access GPT-4, GPT-3.5, DALL-E, and other OpenAI models through Azure with enterprise SLAs.

faqs.question: What about data residency?
faqs.answer: Deploy in 60+ regions worldwide. Keep data in specific geographic locations for compliance.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: Pay-per-use for most services. Volume discounts and reserved capacity available for predictable workloads.

faqs.question: What about custom models?
faqs.answer: Train custom models with Custom Vision, Custom Speech, and Azure ML for domain-specific needs.

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Vary by service and pricing tier (F0: low, S1: medium, S2+: high). Request increases as needed.

limits.title: Transaction Limits
limits.description: Free tier has monthly transaction limits. Paid tiers offer higher quotas and no caps.

limits.title: Data Size
limits.description: Limits on file sizes and data volumes per request. Use batch processing for large datasets.

limits.title: Model Training
limits.description: Custom model training has time and data limits. Scale up for complex models and large datasets.
